narrative:
East Cleveland City Sd city school district has 11,572 registered voters, with 57.1% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 0.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 42.3%, a pronounced Democratic lean of 41.7 percentage points. Registration is trending redder in younger age cohorts (1990s–2000s births lean +8.4% D−R vs +60.0% for 1950s–60s cohorts).
